x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: AI Agents use notification actions to communicate with users and stakeholders. Misconfigured email settings prevent AI Agent notification actions from completing successfully.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Verify SMTP configuration via sys_email_account_list.do. Test outbound email delivery. Configure email templates for AI Agent-triggered notifications. Email is required for AI Agent stakeholder communication workflows.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c31
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[AI Agents use notification actions to communicate with users and stakeholders. Misconfigured email settings prevent AI Agent notification actions from completing successfully.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Email Notification Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_email_account");
gr.addQuery("active",true);
gr.addQuery("type","smtp-sender");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active SMTP email accounts",finding:n<1?"No active SMTP email accounts configured. AI Agents cannot send notifications without outbound email configuration.":""+n+" active SMTP accounts configured -- AI Agent notifications can be delivered."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000489</number><order>100</order><remediation_guidance>Verify SMTP configuration via sys_email_account_list.do. Test outbound email delivery. Configure email templates for AI Agent-triggered notifications. Email is required for AI Agent stakeholder communication workflows.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c31</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Email Notification Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c31</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
